top_signals.title: Don't rely on AI for personal finance advice, study finds
top_signals.summary: Researchers who studied generative AI platforms found that personal finance recommendations could be inconsistent or biased.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Institutional crypto exchange EDX lands $76M from SBI Holdings
top_signals.summary: The funding round comes as institutional investors continue backing crypto market infrastructure despite slower venture investment across the digital asset sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
